description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
New
- CMD+J / CTRL+J → Confetti
Fixed & Improved
- New Chat should work better for new phone numbers on WhatsApp and other networks
- Improve Transcription UI when “Use OpenAI’s Whisper model…” is not enabled
- Transcription text shows in chat list previews and when copying the message
- Better UI for Talk to Type
- Better UI for received voice note messages
- Prevent the “New Messages” indicator from appearing when it shouldn’t
- Ensure Quick Reactions always shows 3 emoji
- Many small UI improvements
